ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
expat:
- '2'
glib:
- '2'
gst_plugins_base:
- '1.26'
libiconv:
- '1'
libsndfile:
- '1.2'
libxcb:
- '1'
libxml2_devel:
- '2.14'
openssl:
- '3.5'
perl:
- 5.32.1
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
zlib:
- '1'
name: gst-plugins-bad
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: gst-plugins-bad
  version: "1.28.2"

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/src/gst-plugins-bad/gst-plugins-bad-${{ version }}.tar.xz
  sha256: 6467e3964828f4d7d08bfe1fbb4d76287a1c8fa76674e59e101a149c020fefd7
  patches:
    # https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gstreamer/-/issues/3022
    - disable_d3d11_in_nvcodec.patch

build:
  number: 1

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - gettext-tools
    - pkg-config
    - perl
    - if: unix
      then: libtool
    - meson
    - ninja
    - zlib
    # The build glib-mkenums is required in cross-compilation builds
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: glib
    - setuptools
    - gobject-introspection
    - if: unix
      then: gst-plugins-base
  host:
    - if: linux
      then: 
        - libgl-devel
        - libegl-devel
        - libdrm
        - libxcb
        - pthread-stubs
        - xorg-xorgproto
        - xorg-libx11
        - xorg-libxfixes
        - xorg-libxext
        - xorg-libx11
        - xorg-libxrender
        - xorg-libxdamage
        - xorg-libxau
        - xorg-libxxf86vm
    - libiconv
    - gstreamer         1.28.2.*
    - gst-plugins-base  1.28.2.*
    - gobject-introspection
    - glib
    - if: not linux
      then: libintl-devel
    - openssl
    - libxml2-devel
    - libsndfile
    - libopus
    # hmaarrfk
    # I'm pretty sure when we removed the static libraries
    # pkgconfig stopped working for anything that links privately to zlib
    - zlib
    - expat
    - if: win
      then: liblzma-devel
  run:
    # We want to pin harder than the run_export from gstreamer
    - gstreamer         1.28.2.*
  run_exports:
    - ${{ pin_subpackage('gst-plugins-bad', upper_bound='x.x') }}

tests:
  - script:
      - if: linux
        then: test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstfbdevsink${SHLIB_EXT}
      - if: not win
        then: 
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstaiff${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstaudiovisualizers${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstcoloreffects${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstgeometrictransform${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstjpegformat${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstmpegpsmux${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstrtmp2${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstsndfile${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgsttranscode${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstvideofiltersbad${SHLIB_EXT}
            - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstvideoparsersbad${SHLIB_EXT}
      - if: win
        then: 
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstaiff.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstaudiovisualizers.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstcoloreffects.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstd3d.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstdirectsoundsrc.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstgeometrictransform.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstjpegformat.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstmpegpsmux.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstrtmp2.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstsndfile.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gsttranscode.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstvideofiltersbad.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstvideoparsersbad.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstwasapi.dll exit 1
            - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstnvcodec.dll exit 1
      - gst-inspect-1.0 --plugin audiovisualizers

about:
  license: LGPL-2.1-or-later
  license_file: COPYING
  summary: GStreamer Bad Plug-ins
  homepage: http://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/
  repository: https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gstreamer/-/tree/main/subprojects/gst-plugins-bad

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - yishai1999
    - tjwilli58
    - scopatz
    - kuepe-sl
